Name: -1_poor_manner_destruction_amused
Representative_Docs: ['Anyone who things hate is funny. Or is amused by death or destruction.', 'usually trashy, bad humor, poor technique, poor quality', 'Questionable behavior, handles situations in a poor manner, either by action or words. Gives people a bad vibe in their manner.']

Name: 0_taste_bad_like_things
Representative_Docs: ['Someone who has bad taste in my opinion would mean that my opinions of those tastes are bad. To put simply, the tastes that I dislike would make me think a person who likes them has bad taste.', "Bad taste to me usually means someone prefers things that seem ugly or just not good to me.  People with bad taste usually don't like things that are considered to be in good taste by most people.", 'When I say that someone has bad taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is very different from the things I like, so, therefore, they have bad taste.']

Name: 1_person_loud_sense_colors
Representative_Docs: ['This person is pretty much the opposite of the person described above. Someone who believes unusual and weird combinations of things are "normal" and that form is separated from and shouldn\'t have anything at all to do with function.', "Someone who may have their own ideas about the aesthetic qualities of objects which generally go against beliefs held by most people in society. Someone who has a sense of humor that is sophomoric and doesn't realize that others may take offense. A person who can't distinguish the qualities that make items desirable to the majority.", 'Someone who watches conspiracy theory shows and drama based reality TV about people’s personal lives. Ancient Aliens and similar shows acively try to mislead people. Shows like Honey Boo Boo and similar just encourage drama amongst the people involved.']
